text:
Once upon a time, in a small village nestled among rolling hills, lived a curious bunny named Bramble. Bramble loved exploring the countryside, discovering new trails and listening to the songs of birds. One particular autumn day, when the leaves had turned orange and gold, Bramble came across something he'd never seen before: a circle of old Christmas lights wrapped gently around a large oak tree.

He scampered up the trunk, marveling at how quiet the night was. That's when he discovered old Mr. Willowworth, a kindly old man with twinkling eyes that hadn oracle glasses.

"Ah, Bramble! You discovered my gift," Mr. Willowworth said, gesturing to the Lights. "Every Christmas Eve, I hang these lights to welcome spirits home. Would you like to stay overnight?"

Bramble thought about it. He wasn't afraid of ghosts. In fact, he loved owl hollows. "Yes, please!"

They spent the night listening to Mr. Willow
